title: stiza pungens
intro: Stiza pungens, also known as 'Stinkweed', is a perennial plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. The medicinal properties of Stiza pungens lie in its ability to repel insects and have anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to alleviate digestive issues, relieve coughs, and soothe skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Stiza pungens often come in the form of teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
